key_finding: K > V for forward-looking probing — K|nums > V|nums at 32/36 layers, mean diff +0.043. K emerges at L0 (V at L3), 2.2x stronger in ramp phase. Phase 1 K>V causal hierarchy EXTENDS to Phase 2 probing. Same ramp+plateau two-phase structure.
evidence_impact: UNIFIES Phase 1 (perturbation) and Phase 2 (probing) narratives. K-routing is the primary carrier of the hidden computation channel in both causal and observational evidence.
next_planned: Cross-model K layer sweep on Phi-3.5-mini, or bootstrap significance test for K-V gap, or RoPE ablation.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles (6 independent). K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates. K>V confirmed in PROBING (32/36 layers).

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: STRONG: Position-sweep on 2 families + 2 sizes. Layer sweep: ramp/plateau for BOTH K and V (exp 089, 091). K>V in probing. Per-operation probing on 2 families. WRRA on 2 families. Paraphrase NULL.

cross_model_replication.status: STRONG: Phase 1 complete (4 families). Phase 2: position-sweep STRONG on 2 families + 2 sizes, WEAK on Mistral. K+V layer sweep on Qwen only.

literature_convergence.status: DECISIVE: 10 scans, 110+ papers, 18+ convergent angles. K=routing/V=content 6 angles. Forward-looking features theoretically explained.
